title: search — permissions
description: Operational permissions on the search surface itself. Per-ENTITY search permissions (e.g. `athletes.viewAny`) come from each domain module — they compose via `requiredPermission` on the #[Searchable] attribute (the query engine filters out models the caller can't see).

permissions.name: search.query
permissions.description: Run search queries. Per-entity filtering applied automatically via `#[Searchable(requiredPermission:)]`.

permissions.name: search.indexes.viewAny
permissions.description: List indexes catalogued for the tenant.

permissions.name: search.sync-jobs.viewAny
permissions.description: List own sync jobs. Regular users only see their own via query scope.

permissions.name: search.sync-jobs.cancel
permissions.description: Cancel own queued / running sync job.

permissions.name: search.synonyms.update
permissions.description: Also grants disable (is_active toggle) on system-seeded rows.

permissions.name: search.saved-queries.share
permissions.description: Mark a saved query as tenant-wide shared. Gated additionally by entitlement `search.can_share_saved_queries`.

permissions.name: search.analytics.view
permissions.description: View tenant analytics dashboards. Aggregated only — raw query text never exposed.

permissions.name: platform.search.indexes.reindex
permissions.description: Trigger reindex on any tenant's index. Audit-heavy.

permissions.name: platform.search.indexes.flush
permissions.description: Drop an index. Destructive. Requires confirmation.

permissions.name: platform.search.sync-jobs.cancel
permissions.description: Cancel any tenant's job, including terminal-state force cancel.
